name: StableLM-Alpha 7B
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer (GPT-NeoX style, parallel attention+FFN)
note: Stability AI's debut open-weights suite (3B/7B alpha), part of the early post-LLaMA open-model wave; later superseded.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via direct fetch of huggingface.co/stabilityai/stablelm-base-alpha-7b (CC BY-SA-4.0 license verbatim, 7B params, 4096 context confirmed) and cross-checked release date Apr 19, 2023 against contemporaneous coverage (TechCrunch, VentureBeat, SiliconANGLE, Simon Willison's blog) all dated April 19, 2023. No benchmark results are published on the model card, so the empty results array was kept as-is (correctly, per instructions, rather than fabricating any). No changes made to input values.
